# UUID Generator Pro

> Free, browser-based UUID/GUID generation and validation tool supporting v1, v4, v5, and v7 versions.

## What We Do

UUID Generator Pro is a production-ready online tool for creating and validating universally unique identifiers. All generation is client-side using cryptographically secure randomness. We support all major UUID versions with batch generation, multiple export formats, and built-in validation.

**Key features:** Generate v1 (time-based), v4 (random), v5 (deterministic), v7 (sortable), validate UUIDs, export as JSON/CSV/text, dark mode, history tracking, copy-to-clipboard.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://uuid-generator.pro/) – Main tool interface
- [About](https://uuid-generator.pro/about) – About UUID Generator Pro
- [FAQ](https://uuid-generator.pro/#faq) – Frequently asked questions about UUIDs

## Use Cases

- **Software Development:** Generate unique identifiers for databases, APIs, and distributed systems
- **DevOps:** Create identifiers for infrastructure, containers, and automation workflows
- **Data Science:** Batch-generate UUIDs for data anonymisation and linking
- **Security:** Generate v5 UUIDs for deterministic, reproducible identifier creation
- **Startups:** Use v7 sortable UUIDs in modern microservices architectures

## Technical Details

- **Standard:** RFC 4122 compliant
- **Security:** Web Cryptography API (crypto.getRandomValues) for cryptographically secure generation
- **Privacy:** 100% client-side processing — no data transmission or server logs
- **Browser Support:** All modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 compliant with dark mode support

## UUID Versions Supported

- **v1:** Time-based UUID (timestamp + MAC simulation)
- **v4:** Random UUID (most commonly used)
- **v5:** SHA-1 deterministic from namespace + name (DNS, URL, OID, X.500 DN)
- **v7:** Unix epoch sortable UUID (modern alternative to v1)

## AI-Friendly Content Structure

This site includes:
- Structured FAQ section with JSON-LD FAQPage schema
- Question-based headings optimised for AI citations
- Direct, concise answers following each question
- Detailed UUID version comparisons
- Definition-based opener content ("A UUID is...")
- Multiple export formats (JSON, CSV, plaintext)
- Dark mode support for readability
- Comprehensive schema markup (Organization, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage)
